rect.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 13.2934px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-opacity: 1;

path.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 16px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-opacity: 1;

circle.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0); stroke-width: 12px; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-opacity: 1;
